text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer... It's you. Perfect timing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
How about some hot-off-the-press<n>divination,
ready to go? I spent my<n>whole day off thinking it
up. I didn't<n>get a wink of sleep!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First, you make a peace sign like this,<n>okay? And
then you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Matikanefukukitaru<n>hasn't rested at
all...
